title: Decapitator
description: Gain the heads of players by killing them with an axe.
body:
# Decapitator
Killing a player with any sort of axe causes their head drops on the ground as well as their loot.

- This only happens when the final blow is directly dealt with an axe, not a bow or sword.

These heads can be used for display trophies, bounty hunting, or even trading!
_____
![Player dropping their head after being killed by axe](https://i.imgur.com/GELjf0l.gif)
_____
